prompt: Generate an oil painting of a cat lying down, using image 1 for pose, image 2 for fur texture, and image 3 for background.
prompt_refined: Generate an oil painting of a cat. The cat should precisely replicate the lying pose of the tabby cat from image 1, with its front paws extended. Apply the dark grey-blue, long, and shaggy fur texture and appearance as depicted in image 2. The background should be the simple, light brown-grey studio backdrop seen in image 3, rendered cleanly without any additional studio equipment.
objects: Cat in a lying pose with extended front paws
Dark grey-blue fur on the cat
Shaggy fur texture on the cat
